mapper.insert: INSERT INTO knowledge_chunk ( project_id, document_id, version_name, chunk_index, title, content, token_count, metadata, chunk_type, parent_chunk_id, section_path, module_name, requirement_id, start_position, end_position, source_type, embedding_status, enabled, deleted, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{projectId}, #{documentId}, #{versionName}, #{chunkIndex}, #{title}, #{content}, #{tokenCount}, #{metadata}, #{chunkType}, #{parentChunkId}, #{sectionPath}, #{moduleName}, #{requirementId}, #{startPosition}, #{endPosition}, #{sourceType}, 'PENDING', true, false, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT id, project_id, document_id, version_name, chunk_index, title, content, token_count, metadata, embedding::text AS embedding, embedding_model, embedding_status, embedding_error_message, chunk_type, parent_chunk_id, section_path, module_name, requirement_id, start_position, end_position, source_type, enabled, deleted, created_at, updated_at, NULL::double precision AS distance FROM knowledge_chunk WHERE document_id = #{documentId} AND enabled = true AND deleted = false ORDER BY chunk_index ASC

SELECT id, project_id, document_id, version_name, chunk_index, title, content, token_count, metadata, embedding::text AS embedding, embedding_model, embedding_status, embedding_error_message, chunk_type, parent_chunk_id, section_path, module_name, requirement_id, start_position, end_position, source_type, enabled, deleted, created_at, updated_at, NULL::double precision AS distance FROM knowledge_chunk WHERE document_id = #{documentId} AND enabled = true AND deleted = false AND ( embedding IS NULL OR embedding_status IS NULL OR embedding_status != 'EMBEDDED' ) ORDER BY chunk_index ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE knowledge_chunk SET embedding_status = #{embeddingStatus}, embedding_error_message = #{embeddingErrorMessage}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = false

UPDATE knowledge_chunk SET embedding = #{embedding}::vector, embedding_model = #{embeddingModel}, embedding_status = #{embeddingStatus}, embedding_error_message = #{embeddingErrorMessage}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = false
UPDATE knowledge_chunk SET enabled = false, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE document_id = #{documentId} AND enabled = true AND deleted = false
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM knowledge_chunk WHERE document_id = #{documentId} AND enabled = true AND deleted = false
